## Verification

- [ ] I ran the smallest relevant test or documented why it is not applicable.
- [ ] I preserved provenance, freshness, gaps, and limits for any brief-style output.
- [ ] I checked source licensing/public-data constraints for new or changed data surfaces.

## DCO

- [ ] My commits include `Signed-off-by: Name <email>` trailers, or a maintainer override is documented in this PR.

Run locally:

```bash
npm run dco:check -- --range origin/main..HEAD
```
